title: Folkcraft Vanilla
body:
## Description

**Folkcraft Vanilla** is a mod adding some interesting little things.

I collect all kinds of novel ideas and implement them in the game, but of course their style does not deviate too much from the vanilla.

## Development

This mod is actively being updated and more things will be added in the future!

## Features

***Check out the full list of features on [Wiki](https://euphony.gitbook.io/folkcraft-vanilla/)!***

### 1. Glass Carpet

**Transparent glass carpet that can be placed on the floor.**

![Glass Carpet](https://i.imgur.com/sqTYp26.png)

### 2. Compressed Slime Block

**The slime blocks bounce higher and higher. Use an iron anvil to smash them together to obtain two slime blocks.**

![Compressed Slime Block](https://i.imgur.com/RmLGNAi.png)

### 3. Amethyst Pressure Plate

**An amethyst pressure plate that can only be triggered by players and emits a signal strength of 15.**

![Amethyst Pressure Plate](https://i.imgur.com/kQrLhHl.png)
